data: {"generalSituation":"The easterly airstream now affecting the coast of Guangdong will moderate gradually today and tomorrow. The weather will improve over the region. Under the influence of an anticyclone aloft, the weather will be mainly fine over the coast of Guangdong in the middle and latter parts of this week.
